name: Bo Bo
page_title: Bo Bo 白波 [Black Mountain Bandits] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
ranks: Black Mountain Bandit Leader (One of Them)

sections.short-biography: A leader of the Black Mountain Bandits who hailed from the Bobo valley.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	白波


	 Simplified Chinese 
	白波


	 Wade-Giles 
	Po Po

	 Other Names 
	Bai Bo

	 Name Notes 
	While 白 is translated as ‘Bo’ in this case, and in the name of the valley from which Bo Bo hailed, 白 is most commonly translated as Bai. As such you may read of a Bai Bo who came from Baibo valley.
sections.ranks: Black Mountain Bandit Leader (One of Them)
